name: Anhui Kouzi Distillery Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Kouzi Distillery Co., Ltd. produces and sells liquor and glass products in China. The company offers its products under the Tongzi, Laokouzi, Kouzifang, and Kouzimei brand names. Anhui Kouzi Distillery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is based in Huaibei, China.
